title: The Real Crisis: North Korea's Nuclear Gambit
summary: Discusses the ambition of North Korea to acquire nuclear weapons. Consequences of a nuclear-armed North Korea to the U.S. and Northeast Asia; Illustration of the noncompliance of North Korea to its safeguards agreement with the International Atomic Energy Agency; Discussion on the option of the U.S. to tolerate the nuclear program of North Korea.
body: Abstract Discusses the ambition of North Korea to acquire nuclear weapons. Consequences of a nuclear-armed North Korea to the U.S. and Northeast Asia; Illustration of the noncompliance of North Korea to its safeguards agreement with the International Atomic Energy Agency; Discussion on the option of the U.S. to tolerate the nuclear program of North Korea. To view full text please see PDF below (login may be required).
